--[[ v1.0.0 https://wearedevs.net/obfuscator ]] return(function(...)local function K(K)return M[K-(-266097-(-279722))]end for K,P in ipairs({{639887+-639886;991217+-990966};{739697+-739696,-773234-(-773435)},{-104317+104519,-784829-(-785080)}})do while
